title: “Student Congress” for Project-Based Elective Courses
content:
“Student Congress” for Project-Based Elective Courses

SDG tags related to the news

DOI

https://doi.org/10.32739/uha.id.87950

The Faculty of Engineering and Natural Sciences at Üsküdar University took the first steps for the "Student Congress" planned to be organized within the scope of "Project-Based Elective Courses."

A Faculty Board meeting was held by the Dean's Office of the Faculty of Engineering and Natural Sciences under the chairmanship of Prof. Osman Çerezci.

At the meeting held in the Central Campus Senate Hall with the participation of faculty members, plans were discussed for the presentation of projects to be prepared by students within the framework of elective courses on a scientific platform.

The implementation principles of the congress and the processes of transforming students' achievements in project-based courses into academic output were evaluated.

The details of the congress, which aims to disseminate scientific culture within the faculty, are expected to be shared with the public in the upcoming period.
